LanguageData.EnableHardEjectionTooltip: When enabled, items exceeding the configured stack limits are automatically ejected from storage onto the floor.
LanguageData.DisplayLogFactorInfo: The storage stack limit slider uses a non-linear scale for easier adjustment. Increase this value if your modded stacks can hold thousands of items (default: 3.0).
LanguageData.DisplayLogFactorExampleNote: (this preview slider does not affect gameplay)
LanguageData.PressIfStackSizeChangedRuntime: Recalculate stack limits after runtime stack size changes
LanguageData.PercentageMode: Use percentages instead of item counts
LanguageData.MultistackModeDisabledTooltip: Only one stack may occupy a single map cell.
LanguageData.MultistackModeEnabledGlobalTooltip: Allow multiple stacks per cell in all storages without per-storage configuration.
LanguageData.MultistackModeEnabledPerStorageTooltip: Each storage may individually allow or disallow multiple stacks per cell.
LanguageData.ModifiedHighlightColorTooltip: Select the color used to mark storage limits changed from default values.
LanguageData.MultistackInfo: Multistack determines how many separate item stacks may occupy one map cell. Custom storage buildings may allow more than one stack per cell.\nThis setting does not affect unrestricted storage. Similar items may still be restricted from multistacking when limits apply.
